ad_title: The Smart Tutor: Social Eagle AI

scenes.visual_action: Living room. Boy is stressed, looking at books. Tutor is tapping his watch. Dad is watching TV where a Social Eagle AI ad plays. He shakes his head. Medium shot, slightly dim lighting to show stress.
scenes.audio_dialogue: Dad: 'Intha AI course ellam waste of money pa. Summa emathuranga.'

scenes.visual_action: Doorbell rings. The neighbor girl (12 years old) stands there holding a football, looking energetic and happy. Bright, natural lighting.
scenes.audio_dialogue:
Girl: 'Aunty, Rahul vilayada varana?' 
Mom: 'Illa ma, avanuku tuition iruku. Unaku matum eppadi evening aana free time kidaikutu? Exams illaya?'

scenes.visual_action: Girl smiles and shows her tablet. The screen shows Social Eagle AI organizing study notes. Close-up on the tablet, then her confident face.
scenes.audio_dialogue: Girl: 'En tutor eppovum en koodave irukange, Aunty. Social Eagle AI! En notes upload panna pothum, enga thappu panren nu kandupudichi explain pannidum. Naan ippo padikrathu mattum illa, games kuda code panren!'

scenes.visual_action: The parents look at each other, realizing the truth. Dad looks at the expensive tutor, then back to the girl.
scenes.audio_dialogue: Dad (thinking aloud): 'Namakku thaan tuition nu ₹500 per hour waste aaguthu...'

closing_voiceover: Tuition-la panatha waste pannathinga. The ₹1,25,000 value GenAI Program is now only ₹15,000! Give your child a 24/7 tutor. Register now for Social Eagle AI!
marketing_psychology_used: Reframes the ₹15k cost as a massive saving compared to hourly tuition, while selling the emotional benefit of giving a child their free time back.
